creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Created attachment 256053
core.txt.1

core.txt.1 starts with my attempt to generate a "normal" vmcore file.  (It causes me severe cognitive dissonance to type that phrase.)   It wrote a dump to my swap partition and rebooted, upon which I got the panic for this very bug, which overwrote the "normal" crash dump, and then that dump got saved as vmcore.1.  I had rearranged my module loading order, which is why this core.txt.1 refers to module acpi_wmi.ko -- it was the first one loaded after amdgpu.ko.  I'll put vmcore.1.z in the directory we've been using.  Then I will retry the "normal" crash dump sequence to get you a "normal" crash dump.  (cringe)
